mapper.sql: peft.employee_id as pe_id, peft.name, peft.relationship, peft.company, peft.post, peft.tele, peft.gender, peft.birthday, peft.mobile_phone, peft.attribute1, peft.attribute2, peft.attribute3, peft.enabled_flag, peft.instructions_flag, peft.check_flag, peft.remarks, peft.family_id as pef_id, peft.id, peft.create_time, peft.create_by, peft.update_time, peft.update_by

${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_pe_id, ${tAlias}.name as ${tAlias}_name, ${tAlias}.relationship as ${tAlias}_relationship, ${tAlias}.company as ${tAlias}_company, ${tAlias}.post as ${tAlias}_post, ${tAlias}.tele as ${tAlias}_tele, ${tAlias}.gender as ${tAlias}_gender, ${tAlias}.birthday as ${tAlias}_birthday, ${tAlias}.mobile_phone as ${tAlias}_mobile_phone, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.instructions_flag as ${tAlias}_instructions_flag, ${tAlias}.check_flag as ${tAlias}_check_flag, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.family_id as ${tAlias}_pef_id, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into pm_employee_family_temp (employee_id, name, relationship, company, post, tele, gender, birthday, mobile_phone, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, instructions_flag, check_flag, remarks, family_id, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{relationship,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{company,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{post,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tele,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gender,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{birthday,jdbcType=DATE}, #{mobilePhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{instructionsFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{checkFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeFamily.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update pm_employee_family_temp set employee_id = #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, relationship = #{relationship,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, company = #{company,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, post = #{post,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tele = #{tele,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, gender = #{gender,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, birthday = #{birthday,jdbcType=DATE}, mobile_phone = #{mobilePhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, instructions_flag = #{instructionsFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, check_flag = #{checkFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, remarks = #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, family_id = #{employeeFamily.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
